case_title: MANSILLA, MARCO vs. ELLIOTT, SHERWOOD IND & DBA SHERWOOD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANSILLA, MARCO AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, SHERWOOD IND & DBA SHERWOOD ELLIOTT STEAM CLEANING
